overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing the protagonist Cal Kestis exploring the interior of a spaceship. The character walks through metallic corridors, a kitchen galley, a common area with NPCs, and finally enters the cockpit with detailed control panels and pilot seats.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship corridor with metallic walls and storage lockers

events.description: character exits initial room and enters main corridor through automatic door

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the metallic corridor of the spaceship, passing wall panels and storage compartments

entered.detail: gray industrial metal wall panels with rivets and seams running along the corridor
long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures embedded in the ceiling
distinctive orange-colored storage locker built into the wall
small illuminated control panel with buttons and lights mounted on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a spaceship interior room and transitions into a narrow metallic corridor. The character walks forward through the industrial-style hallway with gray metal walls, ceiling lights, and occasional storage lockers. The environment is artificially lit with a cool color palette typical of sci-fi spacecraft interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: observation deck with large circular viewport overlooking space

events.description: character approaches the large circular viewport at the end of the corridor revealing space outside

agents.ego_description: walking toward the circular viewport at the corridor's end, observing the view of space through the window

entered.detail: large circular metal frame with segmented glass looking out into space
view of stars and space visible through the circular viewport
technical consoles with glowing screens mounted along the corridor walls
metal racks holding various equipment and storage containers

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the corridor toward a large circular viewport that offers a view of space. The walls feature technical consoles and equipment racks. The lighting remains artificial with a mix of cool blues and warm accent lights. The character reaches the end of the corridor where the circular window dominates the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage corridor leading back toward living quarters

events.description: character turns around 180 degrees and begins walking back through the corridor
character approaches and enters the kitchen galley area from the corridor

agents.ego_description: turning around at the viewport and walking back through the ship's corridors, passing storage areas

entered.detail: tall vertical storage lockers with metallic doors for equipment storage
doorway leading into the ship's kitchen and food preparation area
long counter with food items and preparation equipment in the galley

segments.scene_description: After reaching the viewport, the character turns around and walks back through the corridor system. The perspective shifts to show different storage areas and wall panels. The character approaches and enters the kitchen galley area, transitioning from the narrow corridor to a more functional food preparation space.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship's galley and common room with food stations and seating

events.description: character enters the main common area and encounters other crew members standing near the holo-table

agents.ego_description: walking through the kitchen area examining food dispensers, then moving toward the common room where other crew members are standing

notable_agents.action: alien crew member standing near the holo-table wearing a purple shirt and white apron
human female crew member standing by the wall observing the area

entered.detail: futuristic food dispensers with glowing interfaces and storage compartments containing ingredients
circular table with a holographic display projector in the center of the common room
brown leather padded benches built into the walls of the common area
open doorway leading from the common room into the ship's cockpit

segments.scene_description: The character explores the ship's galley with its futuristic food dispensers and cooking equipment, then moves into the common room area. Two NPC crew members are visible near the central holo-table - an alien in a purple shirt and a human female. The space features leather bench seating and a circular holo-table, with a doorway leading toward the cockpit visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship cockpit with pilot stations and flight controls

events.description: character enters the cockpit through the doorway from the common room
character turns to examine the side control panels and pilot seating

agents.ego_description: entering the cockpit and looking around at the pilot seats, control panels, and flight instruments

entered.detail: two large pilot seats with brown upholstery and control yokes positioned in front of the main viewport
complex arrays of buttons, switches, and glowing screens for ship navigation and systems
large forward-facing window showing the exterior space view with HUD overlays
panels with multiple small screens and indicator lights mounted above the pilot stations

segments.scene_description: The character enters the cockpit through the doorway from the common area. The cockpit features two prominent pilot seats with extensive flight control panels on both sides and overhead. The main forward viewport shows space outside with HUD elements visible. The character looks around the cockpit, examining the various control stations and instruments typical of a sci-fi spacecraft bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the sterile industrial corridors of a spaceship that gradually opens into the ship's social hubs and command center. It begins in a narrow metallic hallway with cool artificial lighting and gray walls, moving forward past storage lockers toward a large circular viewport overlooking the void of space. After reaching the window, the camera turns back through the corridor system, transitioning from the tight technical passageways into the functional expanse of the kitchen galley. The scene then expands into a common room featuring leather seating and a holo-table where an alien and a human crew member stand, before moving through a final doorway. The journey concludes as the camera enters the cockpit, shifting from the lived-in crew quarters to a high-tech bridge filled with flight control panels and a wide forward viewport.
